Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 16}During battle, press {f 1 3 117} for an {f 0 1 2}Assist{f 0 1 27}. The attack most effective against an enemy will automatically be selected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}It works as a shortcut to select one of your attacks that targets an enemy's weakness. Take advantage of this shortcut whenever an enemy's weakness is known.[n]{f 1 1}
